backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Lens Studio backend, handling user profiles, photo metadata, and video metadata storage with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering hooks, pages, and components for the Lens Studio camera app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Lens Studio app with viewport-fit=cover, dark theme-color, and a root div mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing camera/gallery tab state, rendering both CameraPage and GalleryPage simultaneously (toggling visibility) alongside AppHeader, AppFooter, BottomNavigation, and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AnamorphicOverla: Renders top and bottom letterbox bars to simulate a 2.39:1 anamorphic aspect ratio overlay when active.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, a heart icon, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters derived from the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Header component showing the camera lens icon asset and 'Lens Studio' branding with a subtitle, styled with glass morphism.
frontend/src/components/BlurStrengthTogg: Pill-style toggle component for selecting blur strength levels (Light, Strong, Max) with amber highlight on the active selection.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom navigation bar with Camera and Gallery tabs, showing an amber indicator line and scaled icon for the active tab.
frontend/src/components/CinemaControlsPa: Cinema controls panel featuring a draggable circular exposure wheel, color profile selector (Rec.709/Log-C/D-Cinema), and an anamorphic overlay toggle.
frontend/src/components/CountdownOverlay: Full-screen countdown overlay displaying remaining seconds with a pulse animation on each tick and a cancel button.
frontend/src/components/FocalLengthIndic: HUD badge component that displays the approximate 35mm equivalent focal length derived from the current zoom level.
frontend/src/components/FocusEditPanel.t: A canvas-based focus editing panel that renders a bokeh/blur effect on a video frame, allowing users to adjust focus point, radius, and blur intensity via sliders, with export and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/GridOverlay.tsx: An SVG overlay component that renders either a rule-of-thirds grid or a square crop guide on top of the camera viewfinder based on the selected GridMode.
frontend/src/components/ManualControlsPa: A vertical side panel with sliders for manually adjusting exposure (EV) and white balance (Kelvin), showing fallback labels when the controls are unsupported by the device.
frontend/src/components/ModeSelector.tsx: A horizontally scrollable camera mode selector (Photo, Video, Portrait, Cinematic, Night, Pro) with an animated underline indicator that highlights the active mode.
frontend/src/components/NoiseReductionTo: A segmented button control for selecting AI noise reduction strength (Off, Light, Strong, Max), with an animated 'ON' badge when active.
frontend/src/components/PhotoLightbox.ts: A fullscreen photo viewer modal with navigation (prev/next), keyboard support, timestamp display, and delete functionality via a mutation hook.
A pro camera controls panel exposing manual ISO, shutter speed, focus mode (AF/MF with distance slider), and white balance preset selectors, applying constraints directly to the video track.
frontend/src/components/VideoLightbox.ts: Full-screen lightbox modal for viewing a video with controls for close, delete, next/prev navigation, and a Focus Edit panel toggle, supporting keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/VideoResolutionS: UI component rendering resolution option buttons (including 4K detection via getUserMedia) and highlighting the active resolution selection.
frontend/src/components/VideoThumbnail.t: Grid thumbnail component for a video that seeks to 0.5s to generate a preview frame and overlays a play button and duration badge.
frontend/src/components/ZoomSlider.tsx: Slider component for controlling camera zoom level that briefly shows the current zoom value label after interaction and hides when maxZoom is 1 or less.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIBlur.ts: Custom hook that applies a canvas-based portrait blur effect (blurred background with a sharp center oval) to a video element and optionally exposes the processed stream.
Custom hook that manages a boolean anamorphic overlay toggle state persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlurStrength.ts: Custom hook that manages a blur strength level ('Light', 'Strong', 'Max') with corresponding multipliers, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraMode.ts: Custom hook that manages the active camera mode (Photo, Video, Portrait, etc.) with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraSettings.ts: Utility hook that loads and saves camera settings (facing mode, grid, timer, torch, exposure, white balance) to localStorage with typed defaults.
frontend/src/hooks/useCineColorProfile.t: Custom hook that manages a cinematic color profile selection ('Rec.709', 'Log-C', 'D-Cinema') with corresponding CSS filter strings, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCinematicMode.ts: A React hook that applies a cinematic effect to a video element by rendering a blurred background with a sharp center subject and letterbox bars onto a canvas, optionally capturing the result as a MediaStream.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: A React hook that manages a countdown timer with start and cancel controls, tracking remaining seconds and active state, and invoking a callback on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusEdit.ts: A React hook that manages focus-edit state (focus point, radius, blur intensity, preview toggle) for a given video ID, persisting settings to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React hook and context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useManualControls.ts: A React hook that manages manual camera controls for exposure (EV) and white balance (Kelvin), applying constraints to a MediaStreamTrack and CSS brightness filter when provided.
frontend/src/hooks/useNoiseReduction.ts: A React hook and set of utility functions that apply a bilateral-like box-blur noise reduction pass to canvas or byte-array image data at configurable strength levels, with persistence to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, saving, and deleting photos and videos via a backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTorchControl.ts: A React hook that manages torch/flashlight mode for a MediaStreamTrack, detecting hardware support and applying torch constraints when the mode changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoResolution.ts: A React hook that manages the selected video recording resolution from a predefined list, persisting the choice to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useZoomControl.ts: Custom React hook that manages camera zoom state, applies zoom constraints to a MediaStreamTrack, and handles pinch-to-zoom touch gestures.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a dark theme using oklch colors, and utility classes for glass morphism, animations, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CameraPage.tsx: Main camera page component that composes numerous hooks (zoom, countdown, torch, AI blur, cinematic mode, etc.) and UI components to provide a full-featured camera interface with photo/video capture.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page that fetches and displays photos and videos in a merged, timestamp-sorted grid with lightbox support and delete functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based design tokens, custom fonts, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 17) for a Sony Xperia Pro-inspired camera app, listing existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and feature IDs with requirement mappings.
